checked.note: verified in a running system - human live check 2026-07-20 following the interaction checklist (all listed checks passed); incl. the phone-emulation device> check

deviations.what: the bound /ProductCollection shows a 8-row subset of the 123-row mock (ui5/mock/products.json) - a full unroll adds no demo value.

the original binds expanded="{device>/isNoPhone}" (a demo-kit helper model); expressed over the framework's device> model as the expression {= !${device>/system/phone} } - same truth value, different binding text. Confirmed on desktop and phone emulation in the 2026-07-20 live check.
